name: Wescley de Macêdo Sousa
description: Software Engineer Devops Java, Angular, AWS Docker, Kubernetes, Pipeline, Monitoring
aboutme: I'm a Software Engineer with extensive experience in creating high-performance websites and web systems, as well as specializing in building companies' digital identities. My passion for technology and innovation drives me to develop cutting-edge digital solutions that help companies achieve their goals in an efficient and impactful way. I look forward to collaborating with you and your company to create exceptional digital solutions that drive online success. Let's turn your ideas into reality together.
